title: USEC_VERIFY
text: USEC_VERIFY Indicates whether the specified ESMTP extension is supported. Use SMTP security drivers Expected Input Properties , Parameters InBuf , InDataLen , InBufLen DrvArea Expected Output ErrMsg , ErrMsgLen DrvArea Return Status USEC_SUCCESS USEC_ERROR Description This call must be implemented by SMTP security drivers. The caller of the API sends an "EHLO" message to the SMTP server and stores the response of the supported extensions. The ParseReply utility function can be used to parse this multi-line reply. The list of supported extensions, pointed to by the InBuf member and its length in the InDataLen , is passed to the USEC_VERIFY function. The buffer contains each line as returned by the SMTP server, starting with "250…" and ending with carriage return, line feed. Typically the last line is "250 OK" . The driver must not modify the contents of InBuf . The driver must indicate if the extension is supported or not with the return status USEC_SUCCESS or USEC_ERROR respectively.
